[Southern Baltic] POLISH NAV WARN 132/26
142200 UTC JUN
POLISH NAV WARN 132/2026
SOUTHERN BALTIC.
DUE TO MILITARY EXERCISES ZONE IS CLOSED FOR SHIPPING AND FISHERY:
S-6 CENTERED 54-39.2N 016-37.0E
FROM 2026-06-15 22:00 TO 2026-06-19 21:59
ON 2026-06-20 FROM 06:00 TO 12:00
ON 2026-06-20 FROM 17:00 TO 21:59
ZONE IS CLOSED
CANCEL THIS MSG 202159 UTC JUN
